productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Opticourt Ligra Black Sports Shoes
description: A serious pair of indoor sports shoes for serious sportsmen, these adidas Opticourt Ligra shoes amplify each jump and dive with adiPRENE® + forefoot propulsion, hard-hitting heel cushioning and air mesh breathability. Upper Air mesh upper for maximum breathability with synthetic leather overlays for added support Central lace-up system for customised Fit adiTUFF&trade for best abrasion resistance in the toe area Non-slip sock-lining for comfort and performance Midsole adiPRENE® + in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiency EVA insole for comfort Outsole adiPRENE® under the heel for superior cushioning at impact Non-marking rubber outsole with multi-grooves for great grip and traction shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not soak, do not use detergents or solvents, do not machine wash
